entity_data.publication_caption: O tempo passou, e agora nem dá pra acreditar que "Best of You", um dos maiores sucessos do Foo Fighters, já completou 19 anos! 😱 Um baita hit 🤩 Quem aí também deixa o volume no máximo quando esse sucesso começa a tocar na Mix? #foofighters #davegrohl #radiomix #radiomixfm
O tipo de felicidade que só quem aproveita a oferta do Premmia e garante 10% de desconto na troca óleo com os especialistas no Lubrax+ sente 😉

A folia dos pequenos começa aqui! ✨🎭 Na Tip Top tem fantasia para toda imaginação: bailarina, chapeuzinho vermelho, palhacinho e muito mais!  Deixe o carnaval ainda mais divertido! 🎉  Visite a loja no Piso L1 e escolha a fantasia perfeita. 💕

Sua melhor versão não começa na segunda. Ela começa com um look novo. 👟🖤 Endorfina, disciplina e autoestima combinam melhor com peças que te fazem sentir incrivel desde o primeiro passo. ⠀ Dos treinos ao lifestyle: adidas, Centauro, Live! e Track&Field têm os visuais certos pra te acompanhar no caminho da sua evolução. Porque se é pra suar, que seja com estilo. ✨ WHO’S READY?  Vem pro Balneário Shopping.

Que tal um almoço especial neste domingo? 🍽️✨ No Duladu, a culinária italiana ganha um toque moderno e surpreendente, como o Riso de Camarões – arroz arbóreo com vinho branco e três tipos de tomate, finalizado com stracciatella e manjericão. Simplesmente irresistível! 🤌🏼🇮🇹 Aproveite para conhecer as novas operações do Piso L1 e viver experiências gastronômicas únicas no Balneário Shopping. 📍 Esperamos você no Duladu – Piso L1. Buon appetito! 🍷✨

O BFS – Balneário Fashion Show está de volta com a edição Best Winter no Balneário Shopping, nos dias 07 e 08 de maio. Dois dias de desfiles, tendências e encontros com quem faz a moda acontecer em SC. Convites disponíveis nas marcas participantes. Nos vemos na passarela? #BFS2025 #BestWinter #BalnearioFashionShow #ModaComEstilo #BalnearioShopping #BFS2025 #BalnearioFashionShow #BestWinter #ModaSC #BalnearioShopping #OneSpotPromo

De mochilas a materiais, de looks confortáveis a calçados perfeitos – tudo o que você precisa para a volta às aulas está aqui! 🎒📚✨ No Balneário Shopping, você encontra um mix completo de lojas como Livrarias Catarinense, Tip Top, Bibi, Puket, Kipling e muito mais, para começar o ano letivo com estilo, praticidade e conforto. 📍 O melhor do back to school está aqui. Vem conferir! 💙
Looks quentinhos, confortáveis e superdivertidos para aquecer os pequenos neste inverno.  Venha descobrir as novidades da Tip Top no piso L1 do Balneário Shopping!

Uma noite de experiências exclusivas no Balneário Shopping ✨ Ontem, o Balneário Shopping recebeu convidados especiais para um evento único, reunindo as novas operações que elevam ainda mais a experiência do nosso shopping. Uma noite marcada por sofisticação, gastronomia e lifestyle. Cada detalhe foi pensado para apresentar esse novo cenário do Balneário Shopping, um espaço onde luxo, exclusividade e experiências memoráveis se encontram. 📍 Descubra as novas operações e viva essa experiência.

Ontem celebramos o amor com uma experiência que uniu afeto, sabor e memória. 💌✨ O Valentine’s Experience reuniu casais influenciadores para um jantar inesquecível no Duladu — uma noite à altura da data mais apaixonada do ano. Mais do que uma homenagem ao amor, foi também um convite: viver momentos especiais aqui, onde gastronomia, moda e lifestyle se encontram. Porque no Balneário Shopping, cada detalhe importa. 💘

entity_data.img_caption:
The image is an advertisement for an event titled "Broxada Sinistra." The event is scheduled for Friday, June 19th at 20:00. The main focus of the image is two men standing side by side. The man on the left is wearing a gray cap and a dark t-shirt, while the man on the right has short hair, a beard, and is wearing a dark t-shirt. Both men appear to be in a lively setting with colorful lights in the background, suggesting a party or concert atmosphere.

The text on the image includes:
- "QUINTA" (Friday)
- "19/06" (June 19th)
- "20H" (20:00)
- "BENTO RIBEIRO"
- "IAN SBF E" (Ian SBF and)

At the top right corner, there is a logo that reads "BROXADA SINISTRA" in bold red letters. At the bottom of the image, there is a YouTube link: "YOUTUBE.COM/BROXADASINISTRA."

The overall design of the image is vibrant and energetic, fitting the theme of the event.

The image shows two young girls wearing matching pink onesies with a playful dinosaur and cloud pattern. They are standing inside a white teepee tent, which is decorated with colorful triangular flags hanging from the top. The background features lush green trees and a sign that reads "CAMP TIP." The girls appear to be enjoying themselves, smiling and posing for the camera. The overall scene has a cheerful and playful atmosphere.

The image depicts two children sitting on a fluffy, light-colored rug outdoors. The child on the left is wearing a colorful, patterned outfit with blue pants and is sitting on a small suitcase. The child on the right is dressed in a navy blue jacket with red accents and blue pants, and is standing on another suitcase while holding a ukulele. Both children are smiling and appear to be enjoying themselves.

In the background, there is a serene pond surrounded by lush greenery and trees. Above the children, there is a string of triangular flags with pink and beige backgrounds and white polka dots. To the right, there is a sign that reads "CAMPING TIP TOP" in colorful letters. The overall setting suggests a playful and outdoor theme, possibly related to camping or a picnic.

The image depicts two children outdoors in a park during what appears to be autumn, as evidenced by the fallen leaves and the trees with yellowing leaves. The child on the left is wearing a blue hoodie with a dinosaur design, featuring spikes and a tail. The child on the right is holding a colorful kite with various patterns and designs. The background shows a serene park setting with trees and a clear sky, suggesting a pleasant day for outdoor activities.

entity_data.ocr_text: Que tal aquecer o inverno dos pequenos com estilo e diversão? Vem conferir as novidades da Tit Top no Piso L1
entity_data.img_caption: The image features a young girl with curly hair, wearing a light pink jacket over a white shirt and blue jeans. She is standing outdoors in a garden or park setting, holding the handlebars of a bicycle. The bicycle has a basket filled with colorful flowers and small decorative items. Behind her, there is a yellow tent-like structure with a bunting banner hanging from it. The background includes green grass and some trees, suggesting a pleasant, sunny day. The text at the top of the image is in Portuguese and reads: "Que tal aquecer o inverno dos pequenos com estilo e diversão? Vem conferir as novidades da Tit Top no Piso L1." This translates to "What about warming up the winter of the little ones with style and fun? Come check out the new arrivals from Tit Top on Floor L1."

The image depicts a young child standing outdoors, likely in a park or garden setting. The child is wearing a dark-colored hoodie with a pattern of blue dots on the back and red sleeves. The child's hands are in their pockets, and they appear to be looking off into the distance. In the background, there is another person holding a colorful kite, which is partially visible. The scene is bright and sunny, with greenery and trees in the background, suggesting a pleasant day. The overall atmosphere is calm and serene.

entity_data.img_caption: The image shows a person wearing a light-colored hoodie with a hood that has ears, resembling a bunny or rabbit costume. The individual is holding a ukulele and appears to be playing it. The background features a warm, golden hue, suggesting either sunrise or sunset, with trees and foliage visible. There is also a red object, possibly a small amplifier or speaker, placed on the ground next to the person. The overall scene has a cozy and pleasant atmosphere.

The image depicts a cheerful outdoor scene featuring three children, likely siblings, enjoying a playful moment together. The background is adorned with a colorful banner of triangular flags, each decorated with a light blue circle and a pink dot, creating a festive atmosphere.

1. **Children and Their Activities:**
   - **Child on the Left:** This child has curly hair and is wearing a white jacket over a pink shirt with a butterfly design. They are sitting on a small bicycle with a basket filled with flowers. The child is smiling and appears to be in motion.
   - **Child in the Middle:** This child has straight hair tied back and is wearing a white dress with a pink vest. They are standing next to a small table or stand that holds a pink watering can and a suitcase. The child is also smiling and seems to be engaged in an activity.
   - **Child on the Right:** This child is sitting on the ground, holding an apple. They are dressed in a white outfit and white boots. The child is also smiling and appears to be enjoying the moment.

2. **Background Elements:**
   - **Banner:** The banner above the children features triangular flags with light blue circles and pink dots, adding to the festive feel of the scene.
   - **Watering Can:** A pink watering can is placed on the table or stand next to the child in the middle.
   - **Suitcase:** A pink suitcase is also present on the table or stand.
   - **Radio:** There is an old-fashioned radio on the ground near the child on the right, suggesting a vintage or nostalgic theme.
   - **Flowers:** The basket on the bicycle is filled with flowers, enhancing the natural and joyful ambiance of the scene.

3. **Setting:**
   - The setting appears to be outdoors, possibly in a park or garden, as indicated by the greenery and trees in the background. The ground is covered with a fluffy, yellow rug, which adds a cozy and inviting touch to the scene.

Overall, the image captures a heartwarming and playful moment among the children, set against a backdrop of vibrant colors and a festive atmosphere.

The image depicts a young child sitting on a small, beige structure that resembles a house or a playhouse. The child is wearing a dark blue and red jacket with the word "ONLY" visible on the front, along with some other text that is partially obscured. The child is holding a ukulele with both hands, suggesting they might be playing it. 

The child is also holding a magnifying glass to their face, indicating curiosity or an interest in exploring something closely. Behind the child, there is a banner with colorful polka dots hanging from a string. The banner has the words "JUMPING TOP" written on it, which could suggest a playful or festive setting.

The background features a grassy area, adding to the outdoor, playful atmosphere of the scene. The overall mood of the image is cheerful and imaginative, capturing a moment of childhood exploration and creativity.
